final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the counter will count down when the direction signal is high, which is the opposite of what the code actually does.
module up_down_counter
(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input dir,
    output reg [7:0] count
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 8'b00000000; // Clear count to 0
        end else if (enable) begin
            if (dir) begin
                count <= count + 1; // Count up
            end else begin
                count <= count - 1; // Count down
            end
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the counter will count down when the direction signal is high, which is the opposite of what the code actually does.
